mapper.select: SELECT id, stock_name, broker, offering_price, sold_qty, sold_date, sold_price, tax_and_fee, subscription_fee, subscription_year, subscription_start_date, subscription_end_date, listing_date, accounts, withdrawn FROM ipo_subscription ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, stock_name, broker, offering_price, sold_qty, sold_date, sold_price, tax_and_fee, subscription_fee, subscription_year, subscription_start_date, subscription_end_date, listing_date, accounts, withdrawn FROM ipo_subscription WHERE subscription_year = #{year} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, stock_name, broker, offering_price, sold_qty, sold_date, sold_price, tax_and_fee, subscription_fee, subscription_year, subscription_start_date, subscription_end_date, listing_date, accounts, withdrawn FROM ipo_subscription WHERE subscription_year = #{year} AND sold_date IS NOT NULL

SELECT id, stock_name, broker, offering_price, sold_qty, sold_date, sold_price, tax_and_fee, subscription_fee, subscription_year, subscription_start_date, subscription_end_date, listing_date, accounts, withdrawn FROM ipo_subscription WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ipo_subscription (stock_name, broker, offering_price, sold_qty, sold_date, sold_price, tax_and_fee, subscription_fee, subscription_year, subscription_start_date, subscription_end_date, listing_date, accounts, withdrawn) VALUES (#{stockName}, #{broker}, #{offeringPrice}, #{soldQty}, #{soldDate}, #{soldPrice}, #{taxAndFee}, #{subscriptionFee}, #{year}, #{subscriptionStartDate}, #{subscriptionEndDate}, #{listingDate}, #{accounts}, #{withdrawn})
mapper.update: UPDATE ipo_subscription SET stock_name = #{stockName}, broker = #{broker}, offering_price = #{offeringPrice}, sold_qty = #{soldQty}, sold_date = #{soldDate}, sold_price = #{soldPrice}, tax_and_fee = #{taxAndFee}, subscription_fee = #{subscriptionFee}, subscription_year = #{year}, subscription_start_date = #{subscriptionStartDate}, subscription_end_date = #{subscriptionEndDate}, listing_date = #{listingDate}, accounts = #{accounts} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ipo_subscription SET withdrawn = #{withdrawn} WHERE id = #{id}
